sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31840" key="e)kde/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδέννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n31840.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκδέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:1130:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1130.15</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
